entry.title: New: CR 25-71 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending ADOPTION of Resolution 25-177, CD1, to: 1) authorize the acceptance of the State’s interest in the Alulike-Kaonoulu Street remnant lot, comprised of 11,567 square feet, situated in Kīhei, Hawaiʻi; and 2) abandon the remnant lot as a County public highway.

Water and Infrastructure Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
